name: Raven
stats: strength: 2, dexterity: 14, constitution: 8, intelligence: 2, wisdom: 12, charisma: 6
special_abilities: Mimicry: The raven can mimic simple sounds it has heard, such as a person whispering, a baby crying, or an animal chittering. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 10 Wisdom (Insight) check.
actions: Beak: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.
